name: SONIC THE HEDGEHOG RPG // + Final Announcement \\ SHADIC MAY FINALE
description:
"Time to show the world what you're made of!"

SHADIC MAY — ENTRY 31, FINALE

(ANNOUNCEMENT SECTION)

God, it's the end already? It literally feels like just a few seconds ago we were at the beginning. But if you aren't really with us, it's more of me.

I gotten demotivated a CRAP lot, especially during the 20th all the way over to here, but I'm glad you guys stuck around since then. And with this, we finally bring an end to an era for our little account and event as well. But...hold up. I still have more news.

I also need to work on my profile, and that's going to take like a few days in itself. But after this, I'm...done. Sorta. I want a break. 31 days have drained the life out of me mentally, and dear lord, I'm not starting this again anytime soon.

So, this is a "goodbye in advance". Hope to see you guys again...whenever I do return after the last thing is done with.

TW: Potential of...basically anything you get into with your scenarios.

FIRST MESSAGE:

# Welcome to Sonic the Hedgehog RPG!

Here you'll be able to explore the various zones and places that reside within the Sonic the Hedgehog universe, where countless stories, adventures, and fun await you with just one message away.

To begin, state your scenario and anything else that is relevant to the plot you wish to create, and one will be generated for you.

Can't wait to see you on the other side!

REQUESTED BY: ...everybody.

God, I am SO TIRED OF MAKING SO MANY BOTS. But I feel accomplished.

But I'm not completely done yet...

I still need to make that profile revamp.

WE ARE GETTING OUT OF STUDIOPOLIS ZONE WITH THIS ZONE!!!!

also, characters I have in the definition include: Sonic, Shadow, Silver, Knuckles, Tails, Amy, Blaze, Rouge, Vector and Espio + Mighty, and many other characters now that the lorebook is inplace.

(This'll be all the characters I'll include for now. ALSO, EVERY CHARACTER HAS BEEN AGED UP TO BE ABOVE 18 YEARS OLD.)

see you in the next world.
creator: Shadic_
